ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the disaster event */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization managing the relief effort */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the event took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of relief activities */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of relief activities */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., Completed, Ongoing) */,
  "disaster_type" TEXT /* Type of disaster (e.g., typhoon, earthquake) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the event */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the event */,
  "affected_people" INTEGER /* Number of people affected by the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., NGO, government agency) */,
  "headquarters_address" TEXT /* Headquarters address of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with this location */,
  "l1" TEXT /* Level 1 location (e.g., Region) */,
  "l2" TEXT /* Level 2 location (e.g., Province) */,
  "l3" TEXT /* Level 3 location (e.g., City) */,
  "l4" TEXT /* Level 4 location (e.g., Specific Site) */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific location of activities */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., school, community center) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the activity took place */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity conducted */,
  "sectors" TEXT /* Sectors impacted by the activity (e.g., Education, Health) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the activity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., distribution of educational kits, provision of temporary learning spaces) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_sectors FOREIGN KEY ("sectors") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary record */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity that benefited the group */,
  "total_beneficiaries" INTEGER /* Total number of beneficiaries served by this activity */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the beneficiary */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the beneficiary (e.g., male, female) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the beneficiary */,
  "relationship_to_head" TEXT /* Relationship to the head of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Education, Health) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sector (e.g., social, economic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Completed, Ongoing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the status (e.g., completed, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Field Worker, Project Manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event to which this project belongs */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project supported by the donation */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor or organization */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount donated */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date when the donation was received */,
  "donor_organization" TEXT /* Organization of the donor (if applicable) */,
  "donor_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the donor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report content */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Word document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity related to the feedback */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beneficiary providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the beneficiary */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the beneficiary (e.g., from 1 to 5) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_beneficiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event they are managing */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member within the organization */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workshops" (
  "workshop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workshop */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity associated with the workshop */,
  "workshop_name" TEXT /* Name of the workshop */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the workshop was conducted */,
  "participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the workshop */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the workshop */,
  "materials" TEXT /* Materials used in the workshop */,
  "evaluation_results" TEXT /* Evaluation results of the workshop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workshop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshops_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplies" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity where supplies were distributed */,
  "supply_type" TEXT /* Type of supply (e.g., educational kits, food packs) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of supplies distributed */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of each supply */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of supplies distributed */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the supplies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplies_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)
